creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
I am sorry but missed the PR in the commit log.

The branch main has been updated by bofh:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=d8e4f48c9c9ffd40d435143e85e77d39bd713a0a

commit d8e4f48c9c9ffd40d435143e85e77d39bd713a0a
Author:     Muhammad Moinur Rahman <bofh@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2021-04-20 20:29:44 +0000
Commit:     Muhammad Moinur Rahman <bofh@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-04-20 23:22:51 +0000

   devel/gsoap: Update version 2.8.112=>2.8.113

   - Update MASTER_SITES as SF path layout has changed
   Relnotes:       https://www.genivia.com/changelog.html#latest
---
devel/gsoap/Makefile | 4 ++--
devel/gsoap/distinfo | 6 +++---
2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

diff --git a/devel/gsoap/Makefile b/devel/gsoap/Makefile
index 7e3dcdfc2fae..f27dd87a7e02 100644
--- a/devel/gsoap/Makefile
+++ b/devel/gsoap/Makefile
@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
# Created by: Sergey Matveychuk <sem@ciam.ru>

PORTNAME=	gsoap
-PORTVERSION=	2.8.112
+PORTVERSION=	2.8.113
CATEGORIES=	devel
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}2/gsoap-2.8
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}2
DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}_${PORTVERSION}

MAINTAINER=	bofh@FreeBSD.org
diff --git a/devel/gsoap/distinfo b/devel/gsoap/distinfo
index 5c94861fdbd8..7c159074742b 100644
--- a/devel/gsoap/distinfo
+++ b/devel/gsoap/distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1617735453
-SHA256 (gsoap_2.8.112.zip) = 05345312e0bb4d81c98ae63b97cff9eb097f38dafe09356189f9d8e235c54095
-SIZE (gsoap_2.8.112.zip) = 32740160
+TIMESTAMP = 1618948168
+SHA256 (gsoap_2.8.113.zip) = e73782b618303cf55ea6a45751b75ba96797a7a12967ed9d02e6d5761977e73a
+SIZE (gsoap_2.8.113.zip) = 34599639
